name: The Bean
description: A charmingly enigmatic polymer clay figurine that captures the essence of simple joy and wonder. This small, bean-shaped creature, with its innocent, wide-eyed gaze and soft smile, is a delightful companion for anyone who loves unique and quirky collectibles.

name: World's Tiniest Violin
description: This is the World's Tiniest Violin, the ultimate gag gift for anyone who deserves the smallest bit of sympathy.

name: Danny Devito Cheeto Christmas Ornament
description: Made from premium impact resitant plastic to ensure that your Danny Decheeto will be around for years to come. Every detail on Danny Devito's profile has been painstakingly recreated and fully integrated into the essence of the Cheeto.

name: Wooden spoon with face engraved
description: Put anyone's facial features onto a wooden spoon! Affordable and high quality and comes with a bow tied around the spoon, for that special touch- ready to gift to others.

name: Vintage Cast Iron Garden Gnome
description: He has original paint and for his age is in great condition. He has lived as an indoor gnome for well over the last 30 years and has been used as a door stop on occasion. Well loved but needs a new home and some new adventures.

name: Happy Face Planter
description: Handmade with high-quality 3D printing, this whimsical yarn-themed planter will add a touch of creativity to any craft room, desk, or cozy nook.

name: Wicker Egg holder
description: This delightful piece features a unique design that resembles a small basket perched on adorable chicken feet. Standing at 8.5 cm tall, it's the perfect size for holding your favorite eggs while bringing a playful element to your dining experience.

name: Earthworm Plush Toy
description: Classic earthworm in a nice huggable plush form, made entirely from super soft fleece! This snuggly worm friend measures 31” long, and 5” wide. Made from two shades of pink fleece.

name: Cocaine Sugar Bowl
description: This sugar bowl is 3 3/8 inches tall with the lid on and about 4 1/2 inches wide. This sugar bowl holds 13 ounces. The lettering is a very heavy duty durable vinyl. This piece should only be hand washed and NOT put into a dishwasher.

name: Hand Tufted Amoeba Shaped Rug
description: Premium Hand-Tufted Craftsmanship. Each rug is handmade by skilled artisans using the traditional hand-tufting technique. Crafted with high-quality wool. It is 5x8 feet in size.

name: Aged Human Teeth in a Box
description: Every tooth is 3D printed in resin, way more realistic compared to any teeth made from polymer clay. High realism, and not as stinky as real ones. Hand painted piece by piece.

name: Haunted Active Doll | Silas
description: Silas's vessel is a classic Raggedy Andy–style doll, approximately 16 inches tall, featuring his signature red yarn hair, stitched smile, and handmade clothing. Despite his cheerful exterior, there's an unmistakable depth to his presence — quiet, observant, and distinctly adult.

name: Bagels Brass Ring
description: Handcrafted in Las Vegas, this ring is solid - no spaces for water to collect and rashes to form - and made for comfort with a slim band on the palm side.

name: Shitshow coupon
description: Glossy UV and sparkling holographic laminate finish. Perfectly sized at 3.5 x 2 inches. Printed on high-quality 16pt cardstock for durability.

name: Whimsical Girl Holding Ugly Dog Painting
description: Premium quality print with semigloss finish. Available in 11x14 inches. Printed on high-quality, durable paper to ensure vibrant colors and longevity.

name: Toesnail Creature Sculpture
description: Resin cast snail sculpture, hand painted to great detail and finished with a permanent wet look. Custom colour schemes are also possible.

name: Handmade Crochet Clown Phone Bag
description: Each clown phone case is meticulously handcrafted, showcasing a unique design that perfectly blends with every celebratory atmosphere. Made from high-quality yarn, this phone bag is not only durable but also soft to the touch, ensuring your phone is well-protected while adding a touch of whimsy to your accessories.

name: Human Blood Bag Body Wash
description: Scented in black hearted cherry, my human blood bag body wash will leave your crime scene of a body smelling clean and totally not guilty... uh... I mean innocent.

name: Optical illusion Tufted Rug
description: Handmade with high-quality yarn, this optical illusion rug will add a touch of creativity to any room. Its unique design creates a mesmerizing visual effect that captivates the eye and sparks conversation. It measures 80 cms in diameter.

name: Fried Egg Rubber Wallet
description: Made from rubber, stylish and cool, so you can forget the original bags. Has a zipper and a shoulder strap. Perfect for carrying small items like money, cards, keys, phone, etc.

name: Emergency Chloroform
description: Keychain made from solid and durable metal alloy, with a mini vial of chloroform attached. Perfect for cosplay, Halloween, or as a quirky gift for friends who appreciate dark humor.

name: Little Rock Desk Buddy
description: Adopt your very own rock and carry him with you everywhere! All pets come with an adoption certificate. Made of polymer clay and uv resin coating.

name: The Marginally Aware Banana
description: Handmade with sylicone and resin. Its eyes can be moved to look in any direction. Easily washable with regular dish soap and water. Similar hardness to real banana. Not for internal use.

name: Real Two Headed Duckling Taxidermy
description: Discover the rare charm of this two-headed baby duckling specimen, a captivating piece of handcrafted taxidermy art. Each duckling is a real preserved specimen made from ethically and sustainably sourced ducks that passed away naturally — no animals are ever harmed for our work.

name: Wearable Dinosaur Skeleton Plush
description: Turn into a Prehistoric Fossil! Why just play with dinosaurs when you can become one? This Realistic Dinosaur Skeleton Plush is the ultimate hybrid between a cozy giant pillow and a hilarious costume.

name: Realistic Worm Clay Ring
description: This realistic worm clay ring is a unique and quirky accessory that adds a touch of whimsy to your style. Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, this ring features a lifelike worm design that wraps around your finger.

name: Fish With Legs Figurine
description: This fish with legs figurine is weird, funny, and guaranteed to get a laugh. Perfect for a desk, shelf, or as a gift for someone who loves strange little creatures. 3D printed from PLA plastic.

name: Fun print | Chicken Art
description: The design is printed on premium satin 280gsm photo paper. They are printed using high-yield ink on a professional Canon inkjet printer. Please note, prints are sold unframed. The print will arrive in a cello style sleeve, protected in a hard-back, carded envelope.

name: A Little Cringe | Ename Pin
description: elebrate with this lovely enamel pin by Sarah. Made from high-quality materials, this pin is durable and perfect for adding a touch of humor to your outfit or accessories. Aprox 1.5 x 2 inches in size.

name: Cat Embroidered Sweatshirt
description: This cozy sweatshirt features a charming embroidered cat design, adding a touch of whimsy to your wardrobe. Made from 65% cotton, 35% polyester for a cozy and durable feel, it's perfect for casual wear or lounging at home. Available in various sizes to suit all cat lovers.
